post.title: Geopolitics, tech, context for 2025
post.description: In this article, I will outline the key elements of the geopolitical chess game to provide context for current events and market movements.
post.truncated_body_text: In this article, I will outline the key elements of the geopolitical chess game to provide context for current events and market movements. The past year in the markets was all about preparing for Trump’s victory, as I noted in February. Now we are going to examine what this year’s story is.
